authors.author: Mark Hayes
Mark Hayes
Dank sei dir, Gott, du machst uns reich

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wanna say thanks, thanks I give you thanks For all You've done I am so blessed My soul has found rest Oh Lord, I give You thanks

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We wanna say thanks, thanks We give you thanks For all You've done We are so blessed Our souls have found rest Oh Lord, we give You thanks

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I wanna say praise, praise I give you praise For all You've done I am so blessed My soul has found rest Oh Lord, I give You praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thank You, Lord For the strength You give To simply carry on Thru life's toils and tests The worst and best You never left me alone You'll always ride beside me And hear me when I pray And since I first began You've been my dearest friend I give You all my praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I wanna say thanks, thanks I give you thanks For all You've done I am so blessed My soul has found rest Oh Lord, I give You thanks

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I give you thanks for this moment And I will continually For each day I live You've praise to give I'm blessed abundantly I can't forget that moment When in my life You made such change And since the spirit came I've not been the same I just wanna give You thanks
